summary: Frontend testing completed for Earnings Preview page integration into influencer onboarding flow. All 6 test features passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Earnings Preview page fully tested and working. All navigation flows verified.

earnings_preview_page.tier_cards_display: PASS - 6 tier cards (Nano, Rising Star, Creator, Influencer, Star, Celebrity) displayed
earnings_preview_page.pricing_data_from_api: PASS - Pricing data fetched from GET /api/v1/campaigns/pricing-list
earnings_preview_page.platform_tabs_switch: PASS - Instagram, TikTok, YouTube tabs switch correctly

influencer_onboarding_flow.signup_to_otp: PASS - Sign up shows OTP page with auto-filled 123456
influencer_onboarding_flow.preferences_to_earnings_preview: PASS - Preferences Save & Continue redirects to /earnings-preview (NOT /influencer-payment)
influencer_onboarding_flow.earnings_preview_to_payment: PASS - Continue button on Earnings Preview goes to /influencer-payment

features_tested: 1. Earnings Preview page renders at /earnings-preview with tier cards and pricing data - PASS
2. Platform tabs (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) switch pricing data correctly - PASS
3. Back button on Earnings Preview navigates to /influencer-preferences - PASS
4. Continue button on Earnings Preview navigates to /influencer-payment - PASS
5. After completing Influencer Preferences form and clicking Save & Continue, user is redirected to /earnings-preview - PASS
6. Full influencer onboarding flow: Register -> profile -> preferences -> earnings preview -> payment - PASS

mocked_apis.otp: Hardcoded to 123456 and auto-filled in UI
